/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/src/chip8.c.o CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/src/helpers.c.o CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/src/instructions.c.o CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/Chip8.dir/src/stack.c.o -o Chip8  /usr/lib64/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.68 /usr/lib64/libSDL2_image.so
